allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: complete remaining features — AI key setup, info block ingestion, rate limiting, input validation

- Add smDocumentId to infoBlocks schema for saas-maker document tracking
- Auto-provision saas-maker index when user saves AI key
- Ingest/delete info blocks to/from saas-maker on create/delete
- Rate limit chat API to 20 req/min per IP
- Validate slug format, URL format, and content length limits
- Add AI key settings UI in dashboard memory page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(source .env.local && printf '%s' "$TURSO_DATABASE_URL" | vercel env add TURSO_DATABASE_URL production 2>&1)
Bash(vercel env rm NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL production --yes 2>&1 && vercel env add NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL production --value "https://linkchat-dun.vercel.app" --yes 2>&1)

Bash(git add src/app/page.tsx src/components/SaasMakerAnalytics.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: remove broken demo link, guard analytics when API key missing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(vercel env rm AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production --yes 2>&1 | tail -1 && vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production --value "207924374505-mpsbg916etuucq3e9avh241svpdgc6as.apps.googleusercontent.com" --yes 2>&1 | tail -1)
Bash(vercel env rm AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET production --yes 2>&1 | tail -1 && vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET production --value "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" --yes 2>&1 | tail -1)
Bash(echo "207924374505-mpsbg916etuucq3e9avh241svpdgc6as.apps.googleusercontent.com" | vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production 2>&1)
Bash(vercel env rm AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production --yes 2>&1 && echo "207924374505-mpsbg916etuucq3e9avh241svpdgc6as.apps.googleusercontent.com" | vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production 2>&1)
Bash(vercel env rm AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET production --yes 2>&1 && echo "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" | vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET production 2>&1)
Bash(echo "https://linkchat-dun.vercel.app" | vercel env add AUTH_URL production 2>&1)
Bash(vercel env pull .env.vercel-check --yes 2>&1 && cat .env.vercel-check | grep -v '^#' | grep -v '^$' | head -20)
Bash(vercel env rm AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production --yes 2>&1 | tail -1 && vercel env rm AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET production --yes 2>&1 | tail -1)
Bash(vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_ID production --value '207924374505-mpsbg916etuucq3e9avh241svpdgc6as.apps.googleusercontent.com' --yes 2>&1 | tail -1)
Bash(vercel env add AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET production --value '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' --yes 2>&1 | tail -1)

Bash(pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -3 && git add src/lib/auth.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: allow email account linking across OAuth providers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push && vercel --prod --yes 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -3 && git add src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx src/components/dashboard/sidebar.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add View Page link to dashboard sidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push && vercel --prod --yes 2>&1 | tail -3)
